PyCon 2025

The Annual Python Programming Conference

Join thousands of Python developers, data scientists, and enthusiasts for three days of talks, workshops, and networking.

About PyCon 2025

Learn & Grow

Discover the latest trends, best practices, and innovations in the Python ecosystem. Attend talks from industry experts and thought leaders.

Network & Connect

Meet fellow Python developers, collaborate on projects, and build lasting relationships with the global Python community.

Hands-On Workshops

Participate in interactive workshops covering web development, data science, machine learning, and more.

Schedule Highlights

Day 1: Keynotes & Tutorials

May 15, 2025

Opening keynote followed by hands-on tutorials covering Python fundamentals and advanced topics.

Day 2: Technical Talks

May 16, 2025

Deep-dive sessions on web frameworks, data science, DevOps, and emerging technologies in the Python ecosystem.

Day 3: Workshops & Closing

May 17, 2025

Specialized workshops, lightning talks, and closing keynote with community highlights.

Venue Information

Convention Center

Location: Downtown Convention Center

Address: 123 Main Street, Tech City, TC 12345

Dates: May 15-17, 2025

Hours: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM (Daily)

Easy access via public transportation. Parking available on-site. Accessible facilities for all attendees.

📍 Map Coming Soon

Register for PyCon 2025

Secure your spot at the premier Python conference. Early bird tickets available now!

Standard Pass

$299

  • ✓ All 3 days of talks
  • ✓ Workshop access
  • ✓ Lunch & refreshments
  • ✓ Networking events

Premium Pass

$499

  • ✓ All Standard features
  • ✓ VIP seating
  • ✓ Meet & greet with speakers
  • ✓ Exclusive merchandise

Student Pass

$99

  • ✓ All 3 days of talks
  • ✓ Workshop access
  • ✓ Lunch & refreshments
  • ✓ Student networking
